entry.title: Bitcoin covenants are inevitable
entry.summary:
The discussion involves a clarification of the technical expertise prevalent among the majority of the bitcoin community, which notably includes individuals who are not software engineers. This encompasses various groups such as those active on social media platforms like Twitter and Reddit, as well as podcasters. The point is made that despite a general lack of formal software engineering skills, there exists a broad interest and participation in the bitcoin domain from these quarters.
Moreover, the individual in question highlights their own credentials to underline the existence of technically skilled professionals within the community. With a background in software engineering and a role that involves programming specifically within the bitcoin sector, this person also mentions contributing scholarly articles addressing technical facets of bitcoin. This serves to counter any presumptions about their lack of technical acuity and emphasizes that technical discourse in bitcoin extends beyond typical developer engagements. Such insights suggest a diverse range of contributions to the bitcoin ecosystem, spanning both technical and non-technical community members.
